title: Indian Pico de Gallo
description: A tangy, spicy desi-style kachumber salsa for nachos, sides, or a fresh salad.
steps: Combine the onion and tomatoes in a bowl.
Add salt, chilli powder, and lemon juice, then mix by hand while lightly crushing the tomatoes.
Add the chilli or jalapeño and ketchup, then adjust seasoning.
Stir in coriander and any optional additions. Serve cold.
notes: Imported from the original Singh's Connoisseur Corner recipe collection.
